chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Cr. Misc. Appln. No.S-258 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on office objection. For hearing of main case For hearing of MA No.4005/2025 27.10.2025. Mr. Saad Salman Ghani, Advocate for the applicant. ============= Counsel for the applicant does not wish to press the instant application. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Asif.I. Khan
